response.overview: Following his discovery as a product of a bizarre genetics experiment, Joe Takami is on the run from an army of superhuman battle beings. He enters a new battle with the forces of The Rockford Group, alongside his female partner, to turn the tables on his creator, David Rockford.  90s era OVA languishing on VHS, can be found elsewhere.
response.title: Dark Warrior 2: Jihad
